languages.text: {n}От этого механизма веет древностью, нечеловеческой точностью и холодной угрозой. Даже мимолетное вмешательство в его работу кажется не исследованием, а дерзостью, за которую может последовать немедленная расплата.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}От этого механизма веет древностью, нечеловеческой точностью и холодной угрозой. Даже мимолетное вмешательство в его работу кажется не исследованием, а дерзостью, за которую может последовать немедленная расплата.{/n}

languages.text: {n}This mechanism reeks of antiquity, inhuman precision, and cold menace. Even momentary interference in its operation would seem to be not harmless exploration, but rather an outrage provoking immediate retribution.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}От этого механизма веет древностью, нечеловеческой точностью и холодной угрозой. Даже мимолетное вмешательство в его работу кажется не исследованием, а дерзостью, за которую может последовать немедленная расплата.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}This mechanism reeks of antiquity, inhuman precision, and cold menace. Even momentary interference in its operation would seem to be not harmless exploration, but rather an outrage provoking immediate retribution.{/n}

{n}This mechanism reeks of antiquity, inhuman precision, and cold menace. Even momentary interference in its operation would seem to be not harmless exploration, but rather an outrage provoking immediate retribution.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这台机械散发着古老、非人的精密感，以及冰冷的威胁气息。哪怕只是短暂干扰它的运作，都不是什么无害的探索，而是会即刻招致报复的亵渎之举。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This mechanism reeks of antiquity, inhuman precision, and cold menace. Even momentary interference in its operation would seem to be not harmless exploration, but rather an outrage provoking immediate retribution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这台机械散发着古老、非人的精密感，以及冰冷的威胁气息。哪怕只是短暂干扰它的运作，都不是什么无害的探索，而是会即刻招致报复的亵渎之举。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Il se dégage du mécanisme une impression d'ancienneté et de précision non-humaine, accompagnées d'une menace silencieuse. La moindre interférence avec son fonctionnement, même momentanée, serait considérée non comme une exploration inoffensive, mais comme un outrage qui donnerait lieu à un châtiment immédiat.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This mechanism reeks of antiquity, inhuman precision, and cold menace. Even momentary interference in its operation would seem to be not harmless exploration, but rather an outrage provoking immediate retribution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Il se dégage du mécanisme une impression d'ancienneté et de précision non-humaine, accompagnées d'une menace silencieuse. La moindre interférence avec son fonctionnement, même momentanée, serait considérée non comme une exploration inoffensive, mais comme un outrage qui donnerait lieu à un châtiment immédiat.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bu mekanizma; eskilik, insanlık dışı bir hassasiyet ve soğuk bir tehdit kokuyor. Çalışmasına anlık bir müdahale bile zararsız bir keşiften ziyade anında misillemeyi kışkırtacak bir hakaret gibi görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This mechanism reeks of antiquity, inhuman precision, and cold menace. Even momentary interference in its operation would seem to be not harmless exploration, but rather an outrage provoking immediate retribution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bu mekanizma; eskilik, insanlık dışı bir hassasiyet ve soğuk bir tehdit kokuyor. Çalışmasına anlık bir müdahale bile zararsız bir keşiften ziyade anında misillemeyi kışkırtacak bir hakaret gibi görünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Este mecanismo desprende antigüedad, precisión inhumana y una fría amenaza. La más mínima interrupción en su operación no sería considerada una sencilla exploración inocente, sino un ultraje que exigiría un castigo inmediato.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This mechanism reeks of antiquity, inhuman precision, and cold menace. Even momentary interference in its operation would seem to be not harmless exploration, but rather an outrage provoking immediate retribution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Este mecanismo desprende antigüedad, precisión inhumana y una fría amenaza. La más mínima interrupción en su operación no sería considerada una sencilla exploración inocente, sino un ultraje que exigiría un castigo inmediato.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dieser Mechanismus stinkt nach Altertümlichkeit, unmenschlicher Präzision und Gefahr. Selbst eine kurze Unterbrechung seines Betriebes wäre wohl keine harmlose Untersuchung, sondern ein Frevel, der eine sofortige Vergeltung provozieren würde.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This mechanism reeks of antiquity, inhuman precision, and cold menace. Even momentary interference in its operation would seem to be not harmless exploration, but rather an outrage provoking immediate retribution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dieser Mechanismus stinkt nach Altertümlichkeit, unmenschlicher Präzision und Gefahr. Selbst eine kurze Unterbrechung seines Betriebes wäre wohl keine harmlose Untersuchung, sondern ein Frevel, der eine sofortige Vergeltung provozieren würde.{/n}

languages.text: {n}この機構は、古びた機械の匂い、人間離れした精密さ、そして冷酷な脅威を漂わせている。その動作に一瞬の妨げさえ加えることは、無害な探求ではなく、即座の報復を招く暴挙に映るだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This mechanism reeks of antiquity, inhuman precision, and cold menace. Even momentary interference in its operation would seem to be not harmless exploration, but rather an outrage provoking immediate retribution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}この機構は、古びた機械の匂い、人間離れした精密さ、そして冷酷な脅威を漂わせている。その動作に一瞬の妨げさえ加えることは、無害な探求ではなく、即座の報復を招く暴挙に映るだろう。{/n}
